title: anemone narcissiflora subsp. calva
intro: Anemone narcissiflora subsp. calva, also known as Anemone calva, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Anemone calva are said to include treating skin conditions, such as acne and eczema, and also reducing swelling and pain. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, to utilize its medicinal properties.
